products.name: M18 FUEL™ 1/2" Hammer Drill/Driver (Tool-Only)
features: POWERSTATE™ Brushless Motor delivers industry-leading 1,400 in-lbs of torque
REDLINK PLUS™ Intelligence protects against thermal overload and system bind-ups
AutoStop™ control protects the user against violent kickbacks or over-rotation

products.name: M18 FUEL™ Reciprocating Saw - SAWZALL® (Tool-Only)
features: Cuts faster than traditional gas or corded professional saws
Lever-action QUIK-LOK™ blade clamp provides fast, tool-free blade changes
Anti-corrosion blade clamp design protects against concrete slurry and rust

products.name: M18 FUEL™ Rear Handle 7-1/4" Circular Saw
features: Delivers the raw power of a 15A corded worm drive circular saw
Up to 570 cuts per charge on a single M18 REDLITHIUM™ HD12.0 battery pack
Heavy-duty magnesium shoe reduces weight while maintaining professional rigidity

products.name: MX FUEL™ 14" Cut-Off Saw (Concrete & Steel)
features: Full 14" capacity for cutting structural steel, reinforced rebar, masonry, and ductile iron
Zero gas headaches: zero emissions, lower vibrations, and whisper-quiet indoor operations
Push-button activation avoids strenuous pull-starts in the field

products.name: 18V LXT® Lithium-Ion Brushless 1/2" Hammer Drill-Driver
features: Efficient BL™ Brushless motor is electronically controlled to optimize battery energy use
All-metal gear housing and steel-reinforced handle for extreme jobsite durability
Ultra-compact and ergonomic design at only 7-1/8" long for tight overhead spaces

products.name: 36V (18V X2) LXT® Brushless Rear Handle 7-1/4" Circular Saw
features: Powered by two 18V LXT® batteries to output clean, sustained 36V motor power
Automatic Speed Change™ technology adjusts cutting speed and torque under load
Die-cast magnesium base and wrap-around safety blade guard reduce tool weight

products.name: 40V Max XGT® Brushless 14" Power Cutter Saw
features: Matches or exceeds the raw cutting power of standard 75.6cc gas-powered flat saws
Substantially lighter than gas-powered cutters, reducing operator shoulder strain
Electronic feedback sensor stops the motor immediately if the diamond blade binds up

products.name: 40V Max XGT® Brushless Cordless 15" String Trimmer
features: High-performance brushless motor matches power of professional 30cc gas landscaping rigs
Automatic Torque Drive technology shifts speeds intelligently to extend runtime
Manual reverse rotation system quickly clears thick weeds and debris from the spool

products.name: 40V Max XGT® Brushless 18" Chainsaw
features: Professional-grade 18" bar handles heavy residential limb clearing and tree operations
Active Feedback-sensing Technology (AFT) shuts down the motor if cutting stops suddenly
Provides gas-equivalent 42cc motor performance without smelly fuel or cold-start pulling

products.name: M18 FUEL™ Outdoor String Trimmer with QUIK-LOK™
features: Reaches full throttle under 1 second for instant cutting responses
QUIK-LOK™ attachment coupler is fully compatible with pole saws, edgers, and hedge trimmers
Variable speed triggers provide maximum runtime management on light brush

products.name: PACKOUT™ Rolling Tool Box System
features: Part of the industry's most durable and versatile modular site-storage system
Constructed from high-grade impact-resistant polymers for concrete and outdoor use
Heavy-duty telescoping extension handle offers reliable towing on rough aggregate surfaces

products.name: 1-5/8" SDS-Max Combination Rotary Hammer
features: Turbo™ Power feature boosts impact energy by 20% in hammer-only chisel mode
Built-in active Vibration Control handle reduces fatigue on large anchoring jobs
Vario-Lock™ system rotates and locks chisels into 12 distinct positions for ergonomic chipping

products.name: MS 261 C-M Professional Gas Chainsaw
features: STIHL M-Tronic™ electronic engine management auto-tunes fuel-air mixture under cold temperatures
High-efficiency anti-vibration rubber mounts protect commercial timber workers
Emissions system reduces environmental exhaust output up to 50% vs legacy chainsaws

products.name: EU2200i Super Quiet Inverter Generator
features: Honda Inverter technology delivers clean, pure-sine wave power safe for sensitive computer gear
Eco-Throttle™ system adjusts throttle speed to load, boosting runtimes up to 8.1 hours on one tank
Whisper-quiet operational levels preserve contractor communication and residential peace

products.name: 14" Segmented Elite-Cut Diamond Saw Blade
features: Professional-grade diamond segments engineered for rapid wet or dry concrete cutting
Deep laser-cut expansion slots protect the steel core from warp and heat buildup
Segmented rim style delivers immediate slurry disposal and lightning-fast cutting speeds

products.name: M18 REDLITHIUM™ HIGH OUTPUT™ HD12.0 Battery
features: Delivers 50% more raw power and runs up to 50% cooler than legacy M18 battery packs
Optimized for power-hungry heavy demolition, concrete sawing, and sustained grinding tools
High-durability internal rubber barriers safeguard cells from extreme field vibrations

products.name: 18V LXT® Brushless 5" Angle Grinder (Tool-Only)
features: Brushless motor is electronically controlled to optimize battery life on industrial sites
Electronic sensor shuts off the tool if wheel rotation suddenly drops or binds
Ergonomic barrel design with rubberized soft grips maximizes worker comfort and reach

products.name: BR 800 C-E Magnum Backpack Blower
features: Most powerful blower in the STIHL gas catalog, optimized for heavy valley leaves and soil
Ergonomic backpack harness with adjustable support chest straps minimizes hip fatigue
Side-start starter pull allows the operator to restart the blower easily while carrying it

rentals.name: Honda GX160 Premium Plate Compactor
rentals.description: Premium flat plate compactor engineered for heavy clay, aggregate, and asphalt compaction in foundations and driveway trenches. Heavy-duty Honda GX160 starts reliably first-time.

rentals.name: Milwaukee MX FUEL™ 14" Concrete Cut-Off Saw
rentals.description: Zero emissions cordless concrete cutter matching gas-powered tools. Perfect for indoor trenching, concrete floor patching, and commercial basement expansion where gas fumes are prohibited.

rentals.name: Honda EU3000iS Super Quiet Inverter Generator

specs.Runtime Capacity: Up to 20 Hours on 3.4 Gal tank

rentals.description: Delivers super quiet, ultra-clean pure sine wave electricity ideal for complex construction lasers, computer stations, mobile offices, and sensitive heavy field equipment.

rentals.name: Milwaukee MX FUEL™ Demolition Breaker Hammer
rentals.description: High-impact heavy demolition concrete breaker hammer. Eliminates compressor hose towing and local gas fumes while breaking up to 2 tons of thick concrete per charge.

rentals.name: Honda GX390 4000 PSI Commercial Power Washer
rentals.description: Heavy-duty commercial grade pressure washer combining a 13 HP Honda engine with a CAT Triplex pump. Strips away stubborn dry paint, mud, deep grease, and jobsite grime instantly.

rentals.name: Husqvarna FS 400 LV Walk-Behind Flat Saw
rentals.description: Very convenient, compact walk-behind flat saw designed for concrete slab trenching, road utility cuts, and expansion joints. Features a patented gas spring depth assist lever.

rentals.name: Stihl BT 131 Professional Earth Auger
rentals.description: One-man professional earth drill equipped with an oversized hip brake block which instantly cuts engine ignition if the auger bit hits a deep rock or tree root.

rentals.name: Bear Cat CH4554 Road-Towable 4" Wood Chipper
rentals.description: Compact, highly towable gravity-feed commercial drum wood chipper. Quickly pulverizes tough brush, oak branches, and garden orchard waste into premium compost wood chips.

rentals.name: Sullair 185 CFM Towable Rotary Screw Compressor
rentals.description: Industrial tow-behind rotary screw diesel air compressor. Runs multiple pneumatic demolition hammers, asphalt rock drills, sandblasting units, or industrial paint lines simultaneously.
